angles.name: missed_opportunity
angles.template:
I was looking at businesses in {location} and noticed {business_name} doesn't have a website yet. In 2026, that's rare — and it means customers searching for {category} services are landing on competitor pages instead of yours.

A simple, professional site changes that. I build them fast and affordably.

Would you be open to a quick conversation?

angles.name: competitor_advantage
angles.template:
Your competitors in {location} have websites. {business_name} doesn't. That puts you at a disadvantage before a customer even picks up the phone.

A single-page site with your contact info, services, and location is enough to get you on the map.

Got 5 minutes this week to discuss?

angles.name: credibility_gap
angles.template:
{business_name} has {rating} stars from {review_count} reviews on Google — but without a website, many potential customers never get to see that proof of quality.

A website backs up your reputation with a professional presence that builds trust instantly.

I'd love to show you how simple this can be.
